name: Associate Member
description: Ideal for individual researchers, policy experts, and independent carbon professionals looking to join the network.
benefits: Regular updates on CCTS & GCP regulations
Directory listing as an Associate Member
5% discount on India Climate Week tickets

name: FPO & NGO Member
description: Subsidized tier for Farmer Producer Organizations, agricultural cooperatives, and non-profit green groups.
benefits: Direct support for biochar & soil projects

name: Corporate Patron
description: Designed for large industrial groups, project developers, financial institutions, and carbon buyers.
benefits: Voting seat on CMAI/CRIA advisory councils
Early access to research publications & data
Logo branding on homepage and events
2 free passes to India Climate Week
Direct advisory support on CCTS compliance
